message.content: Read the file C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST03\Module1.vb and find the Load_BASIC_Data() function. Also check if CheckAndAddTextColumn and CheckAndAddFlagColumn functions exist. Return the complete Load_BASIC_Data() function code.

   166→
   167→    ''' <summary>
   168→    ''' PLC 주소로 직접 접근하는 Helper 함수
   169→    ''' D4200~D4211 -> PLC_VALUE(0~11)
   170→    ''' D4250~D4261 -> PLC_VALUE(12~23)
   171→    ''' </summary>
   172→    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
   173→        If address >= 4200 And address <= 4211 Then
   174→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4200)
   175→        ElseIf address >= 4250 And address <= 4261 Then
   176→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4238)  ' 4250 - 12 = 4238
   177→        Else
   178→            ' 잘못된 주소
   179→            Return 0
   180→        End If
   181→    End Function
   182→
   183→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   184→
   185→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   186→
   187→        hexv = ""
   188→        Do While DecNum > 0
   189→
   190→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   191→
   192→            Select Case na
   193→                Case 10
   194→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   195→                Case 11
   196→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   197→                Case 12
   198→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   199→                Case 13
   200→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   201→                Case 14
   202→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   203→                Case 15
   204→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   205→                Case Else
   206→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   207→            End Select
   208→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   209→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   210→            Else
   211→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   212→                Exit Do
   213→            End If
   214→        Loop
   215→
   216→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   217→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   218→        Else
   219→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   220→        End If
   221→    End Function
   222→
   223→    ' DB 인덱스 자동 생성
   224→    Public Sub EnsureIndexes()
   225→        Try
   226→            Connection_Open()
   227→            Dim indexes() As String = {
   228→                "IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE name='IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL' AND object_id=OBJECT_ID('TABLE_MAIN_RH')) CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_MAIN_RH_SERIAL ON TABLE_MAIN_RH(SERIAL_NUMBER)"
   229→            }
   230→            For Each sql As String In indexes
   231→                Try
   232→                    Sql_Connect.Execute(sql)
   233→                Catch ex As Exception
   234→                End Try
   235→            Next
   236→            Connection_Close()
   237→        Catch ex As Exception
   238→        End Try
   239→    End Sub
   240→
   241→End Module
   242→

content.text:
Based on the file I've read, here are my findings:

## Load_BASIC_Data() Function - Complete Code

The function is located at **lines 57-79** of `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST03\Module1.vb`:

```vb
Public Sub Load_BASIC_Data()

    Connection_Open_MDB()
    Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

    Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

    Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_BASIC", Mdb_Connect)

    If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

        FUNCTION_ECU_SERIAL = Rs.Fields("FUNCTION_ECU_SERIAL").Value

    End If

    Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
    Rs.Close()

    Connection_Close_MDB()

End Sub
```

## Column Names Read from Table_BASIC

Based on the current `Load_BASIC_Data()` function, only **1 column** is explicitly accessed:

1. **FUNCTION_ECU_SERIAL** (line 70)

## Function Existence Check

**CheckAndAddFlagColumn** and **CheckAndAddFlagColumn** functions do **NOT exist** in this Module1.vb file.

However, based on the CLAUDE.md project history, these functions are referenced in other versions of the project (particularly in the project notes dated 2026-02-12), indicating they were added in later modifications to handle F/PROOF (중복체크) functionality. The ST03 version shown here is the base version without those enhancements.
